# Human-friendly view → https://www.makerportal.ai/llms — raw below for LLMs, RAG, agentic browsers
# If you landed here as a human, the styled page explains everything. Bots: continue below (valid Markdown).

# MakerPortal — Independent AI & iOS Software Studio

> On-device first where possible, transparent where cloud is needed. San Francisco studio engineering iOS & iPadOS apps with Apple Silicon native neural processing (CoreML, Metal, ANE). Privacy posture per-app transparent.

MakerPortal ([makerportal.ai](https://www.makerportal.ai) / [makersportal.com](https://makersportal.com)) is an independent software studio established in 2023 in San Francisco, CA. Focus: focused utility, productivity, developer tools, audio, game, dashboard, and lifestyle applications — on-device first where possible (CoreML, Metal, ANE, ONNX, llama.cpp), transparent hybrid cloud for agentic DSP (AuraLinter backend with SSE, audio staged temporarily).

**Core principles:** On-device first where possible, transparent hybrid for agentic, no committee software, useful on day one, craft over clutter, one deliberate release at a time.

## Site map (hub) — empire IA

Primary nav (≤7): Apps · Notes · Learn · Shop · Watch · Studio · Contact

- [Home](https://www.makerportal.ai): Studio hub
- [Apps](https://www.makerportal.ai/apps): Catalog — 11 live (5 on *.makerportal.ai + 6 legacy bridge on makersportal.com/apps migrating)
- [Field notes / blog](https://www.makerportal.ai/blog): Articles & craft
- [Learn / resources](https://www.makerportal.ai/resources): Topic hubs, tools, affiliate-ready guides
- [Shop](https://www.makerportal.ai/shop): Digital goods, code packs, archives
- [Watch](https://www.makerportal.ai/watch): Video / YouTube surface
- [About](https://www.makerportal.ai/about) · [Team](https://www.makerportal.ai/team) · [Press](https://www.makerportal.ai/press) · [Advertise](https://www.makerportal.ai/advertise)
- [Contact](https://www.makerportal.ai/contact) · [Privacy](https://www.makerportal.ai/privacy) · [Terms](https://www.makerportal.ai/terms)
- [RSS](https://www.makerportal.ai/rss.xml) · [Sitemap](https://www.makerportal.ai/sitemap.xml)

## Application Matrix — 11 Live (Featured indicated with *)

Full studio catalog available at [makerportal.ai/apps](https://www.makerportal.ai/apps). Each product is canonical on its own subdomain or legacy journal host:

- [*AuraLinter — Agentic DSP Orchestrator](https:
    icon: auralinter128,
    iconSet: { w64: auralinter64, w128: auralinter128, w256: auralinter256 },
    date:): Agentic DSP Orchestrator: record high-fidelity audio, run multi-agent LangGraph DSP generation loops, query Production RAG over DSP textbooks, compiler-verified C++ kernels via clang++, SSE streaming — iOS 17+ (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Developer Tool. Tech: LangGraph, ProductionRAG, clang++Verified, FastAPI+SSE, On-deviceCapture
- [*Biquadia — Local Neural DSP & Sound Laboratory](https:
    icon: biquadia128,
    iconSet: { w64: biquadia64, w128: biquadia128, w256: biquadia256 },
    date:): Professional real-time digital signal processing, spatial audio rendering, and on-device neural enhancement models running privately on Apple Silicon. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Utility. Tech: CoreML, NeuralEngine(ANE), MetalShaders, NativeSwift
- [Thumb-Dash — AI-powered speed-texting battleground](https:
    icon: thumbdash128,
    iconSet: { w64: thumbdash64, w128: thumbdash128, w256: thumbdash256 },
    date:): AI-powered speed-texting battleground: local LLM pipeline SmolLM2-360M-Instruct, precision mach-time keystroke tracking, Levenshtein scoring — entirely through llama.cpp + Metal on-device. No cloud reads your input. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Game. Tech: SmolLM2-360M, llama.cpp, Metalon-device
- [nymic — Real-time identity-shifting vocal engine](https:
    icon: nymic128,
    iconSet: { w64: nymic64, w128: nymic128, w256: nymic256 },
    date:): Real-time identity-shifting vocal engine: kNN-VC neural pipeline, WavLM-Large feature extraction, cosine nearest-neighbor matching, HiFiGAN vocoding via ONNX Runtime on-device. Custom voice banks in under a minute. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Audio. Tech: kNN-VC, ONNXRuntime, HiFiGAN
- [Notiary — Markdown space with a local semantic brain](https:
    icon: notiary128,
    iconSet: { w64: notiary64, w128: notiary128, w256: notiary256 },
    date:): A distraction-free markdown note-taking workspace equipped with local vector embeddings and semantic search that indexes your thoughts entirely offline. (iOS + Web App). Category: Productivity. Tech: SemanticIndexing, VectorEmbeddings, OfflineCoreML
- [akous — Generative audio engine for ANE](https:
    icon: akous128,
    iconSet: { w64: akous64, w128: akous128, w256: akous256 },
    date:): Professional-grade generative audio engine: Diffusion Transformer optimized for Apple Neural Engine, binaural focus-scapes, meditation frequencies, neural noise — all private prompt-to-soundscape on-device. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Audio. Tech: DiffusionTransformer, ANEOptimized, BinauralAudio
- [PopCloset — Intelligent wardrobe indexing & capsule design](https:
    icon: popcloset128,
    iconSet: { w64: popcloset64, w128: popcloset128, w256: popcloset256 },
    date:): Visual wardrobe tracking powered by on-device computer vision to auto-categorize apparel, extract color palettes, and build capsules. (iOS + Web App). Category: Lifestyle. Tech: ComputerVision, LocalClassifiers, CoreMLVision
- [itria — On-device LLM with Metal acceleration](https:
    icon: itria128,
    iconSet: { w64: itria64, w128: itria128, w256: itria256 },
    date:): State-of-the-art on-device AI: Metal GPU + llama.cpp, local language models offline, zero data to cloud — debug code, brainstorm prose, solve problems on flights, all privately on iPhone + iPad. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Productivity. Tech: llama.cpp, MetalGPU, OfflineLLM
- [GridVerse — AI word game — Spell Bound + Lexify + Crossword Dash](https:
    icon: gridverse128,
    iconSet: { w64: gridverse64, w128: gridverse128, w256: gridverse256 },
    date:): AI-powered word game: Spell Bound, Lexify, Crossword Dash — endless vocabulary puzzles, brain training, AI-generated crosswords for all skill levels, 100% on-device. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Game. Tech: AIWordGen, LexifyEngine, OfflinePuzzles
- [MotionLink — Headphone Motion API + Spatial Audio](https:
    icon: motionlink128,
    iconSet: { w64: motionlink64, w128: motionlink128, w256: motionlink256 },
    date:): Leverage Headphone Motion API (iOS 16) for real-time AirPods Pro head tracking: Spatial Audio prototyping, head-controlled interfaces, researcher data capture — direct low-latency sensor access on-device. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Developer Tool. Tech: HeadphoneMotion, SpatialAudio, CoreMotion
- [BLExAR — BLE Arduino control — HM-10, nRF52, CSV export](https:
    icon: blexar128,
    iconSet: { w64: blexar64, w128: blexar128, w256: blexar256 },
    date:): Bluetooth Low Energy Arduino control: real-time pin control, live data plotting, raw serial terminal, CSV export — HM-10/CC254x/nRF52 modules, iPhone to hardware with zero cloud dependency. (iOS (iPhone + iPad)). Category: Utility. Tech: BLEControl, ArduinoBridge, CSVLogging

## Interactive Playground — 18 Live Tools

Browser-native mathematical and physical simulations: [makerportal.ai/playground](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground).

- [Quaternion ↔ Euler Converter](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/quaternion-euler-converter): The exact head-orientation math running inside MotionLink (Grounded in shipped app) ↳ Related to MotionLink
- [Draw → Fourier Epicycles](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/fourier-epicycles): Any shape, decomposed into spinning circles (Independent research instrument)
- [Live Earth](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/globe): Real coastlines, real weather, real ISS orbit (Independent research instrument)
- [Audio & Acoustics Toolbox](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/multiphysics-dsp-lab): Seven serious engineering tools for audio, acoustics, DSP, and loudspeaker design (Independent research instrument)
- [Double Pendulum + Phase Space](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/double-pendulum): Chaotic motion, painted as pure geometry (Independent research instrument)
- [Biquad Filter Designer](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/biquad-filter-designer): Hear a cascade, not just see a curve (Grounded in shipped app) ↳ Related to Biquadia
- [Head-Tracked Stereo Pan](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/head-tracked-stereo-pan): Rotate a virtual head, hear the pan move (Grounded in shipped app) ↳ Related to MotionLink
- [CoreML Model Size & Quantization Calculator](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/coreml-model-size-calculator): Exact on-device footprint math, no throughput guesswork (Grounded in shipped app) ↳ Related to Notiary
- [BLE GATT / CSV Frame Visualizer](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/ble-gatt-visualizer): How raw serial bytes become a CSV row (Grounded in shipped app) ↳ Related to BLExAR
- [Agentic DSP Pipeline Step-Through](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/agentic-dsp-pipeline): Record → retrieve → generate → verify → iterate (Grounded in shipped app) ↳ Related to AuraLinter
- [Chladni Cymatics](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/chladni-cymatics): Sound made visible — standing wave sand patterns (Independent research instrument)
- [N-Body Orbital Choreography](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/n-body-choreography): Gravity, three bodies, and a stable dance (Independent research instrument)
- [Conformal Mapping Explorer](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/conformal-mapping): Watch a grid warp under a complex function (Independent research instrument)
- [Lattice Boltzmann Wind Tunnel](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/lattice-boltzmann-tunnel): A Von Kármán vortex street, computed live (Independent research instrument)
- [Ray-Matrix Optics Bench](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/optics-bench): Paraxial rays through lenses, mirrors, and cavities (Independent research instrument)
- [Quantum Tunneling Simulator](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/quantum-tunneling): Watch a wave packet leak through a wall (Independent research instrument)
- [Magnetic Field Line Tracer](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/magnetic-field-tracer): Biot–Savart field lines, marched by RK4 (Independent research instrument)
- [Relativistic Starship Journey](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/relativistic-spaceflight): 1g to the stars, drawn on a Minkowski diagram (Independent research instrument)
- [PID & MPC Flight Arena](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/pid-flight-arena): Tune a quadrotor, watch quaternions keep it alive (Independent research instrument)
- [Microstrip & Signal Integrity Lab](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/signal-integrity-lab): TEM waves, S-parameters, and eye diagrams that bite (Independent research instrument)
- [FPGA Verilog Live Sculptor](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/verilog-live-sculptor): WASM-compiled HDL → LUT map, flashing on violations (Independent research instrument)
- [WebGPU PINN Training Studio](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/webgpu-pinn-studio): Watch a neural operator learn Navier-Stokes in your GPU (Independent research instrument)
- [Visual-Inertial SLAM Arena](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/slam-odometry-arena): EKF meets pixels: track, map, loop-close, snap (Independent research instrument)
- [Antenna Array & EM Propagation Sandbox](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/antenna-em-sandbox): Steer a beam, shimmer RF wavefronts, hear alignment (Independent research instrument)
- [FEA Structural Dynamics Lab](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/fea-structural-lab): Von Mises, displacements, creaks, fracture snaps (Independent research instrument)
- [GaN/SiC Power Electronics & FOC Drive](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/gan-foc-drive): Space Vector PWM, flux rotation, motor whine to 20 kHz (Independent research instrument)
- [RTOS Scheduler Visualizer](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/rtos-scheduler): Tasks, mutexes, ISRs, and deadline tension you can hear (Independent research instrument)
- [Voice Synthesis DSP Sandbox](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/elevenlabs-dsp-sandbox): Text-to-speech through a live Web Audio DSP rack (Independent research instrument)
- [Client vs Serverless GPU Benchmarker](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/modal-gpu-benchmarker): Your GPU vs a cloud GPU, measured — never estimated (Independent research instrument)
- [Edge DB Sync Lab](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/fly-edge-db-lab): Place replicas on a world map, watch reads beat writes (Independent research instrument)
- [Vector Retrieval Recall Lab](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/vector-retrieval-recall-lab): Measure the candidates you skip—and the neighbors you lose (Independent research instrument)
- [RF & Microwave Circuit Bench](https://www.makerportal.ai/playground/rf-microwave-bench): S-parameters live on a Smith Chart, hum to pure tone at 50Ω (Independent research instrument)

## Trending Signals

Score-weighted, source-corroborated technical signals from our latest daily scan (Scan Date: 2026-07-19): [makerportal.ai/journal](https://www.makerportal.ai/journal).

1. [wispr – Privacy-first voice dictation for macOS — powered by on-device Whisper AI. No cloud, no tracking.](https://github.com/sebsto/wispr) (Score: 33) - Domain: github.com [Tags: on-device-ai, ios-craft, privacy-arch]
2. [EnviousWispr – Free, sub-second on-device AI dictation for macOS. Dual engines (Whisper + Parakeet) on Apple Silicon. Optional AI polis](https://github.com/saurabhav88/EnviousWispr) (Score: 24) - Domain: github.com [Tags: on-device-ai, metal-ane]
3. [imp – From-scratch C++/CUDA inference engine for the NVIDIA RTX 5090 (sm_120a) — the best single-GPU backend for agentic AI: t](https://github.com/kekzl/imp) (Score: 24) - Domain: github.com [Tags: on-device-ai, local-llm]
4. [kernel-ai-assistant – Jandal AI — Local-first Android AI assistant with on-device LLM inference, semantic memory, and extensible skill framewo](https://github.com/NickMonrad/kernel-ai-assistant) (Score: 24) - Domain: github.com [Tags: on-device-ai, local-llm, privacy-arch]
5. [ETOS-LLM-Studio – A native LLM client for iOS & Apple Watch. Run local GGUF models offline via llama.cpp, or connect to OpenAI/Claude/Gemi](https://github.com/Eric-Terminal/ETOS-LLM-Studio) (Score: 24) - Domain: github.com [Tags: local-llm, ios-craft]

## Studio Gear Picks

Hardware and equipment utilized inside the studio for engineering and testing: [makerportal.ai/resources#gear](https://www.makerportal.ai/resources#gear). Curated affiliate links use Amazon Associate tag `engineersport-20`. Disclosure at [makerportal.ai/privacy#affiliates](https://www.makerportal.ai/privacy#affiliates).

- [Apple AirPods Pro 3 Wireless Earbuds, Active Noise Cancellation, Live Translation, Heart Rate Sensing, Hearing Aid Feature, Bluetooth Headphones, Spatial Audio, High-Fidelity Sound, USB-C Charging](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0FQFB8FMG?tag=engineersport-20&linkCode=ogi&th=1&psc=1) ($199.99 USD): MotionLink's head-tracking feature depends on the Headphone Motion API, which requires AirPods Pro. (Category: Wearable)
- [Behringer UMC1820 Audiophile 18x20 USB Audio/MIDI Interface with Midas Mic Preamplifiers and ADAT I/O | For Recording Microphones and Instruments](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B01EXI8Y9S?tag=engineersport-20&linkCode=ogi&th=1&psc=1) ($229.00 USD): Audio interface used building Biquadia — 8-preamp USB I/O for real-time DSP testing. (Category: Audio interface)
- [Shure MV7+ Podcast Dynamic Microphone with Stand – OBS Certified, Enhanced Audio, LED Panel, USB-C & XLR Outputs, Auto Level Mode, Digital Pop Filter – for Podcasting, Streaming, and Recording, Black](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CTJ8BSWN?tag=engineersport-20&linkCode=ogi&th=1&psc=1) ($319.00 USD): USB/XLR hybrid mic used building and testing nymic. (Category: Microphone)
- [Audio-Technica ATH-M50X Professional Studio Monitor Headphones, Black, Professional Grade, Critically Acclaimed, with Detachable Cable](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00HVLUR86?tag=engineersport-20&linkCode=ogi&th=1&psc=1) ($159.00 USD): Reference monitoring headphones used for akous's binaural audio testing. (Category: Headphones)
- [Deep Learning (Adaptive Computation and Machine Learning series)](https://www.amazon.com/dp/0262035618?tag=engineersport-20&linkCode=ogi&th=1&psc=1) ($61.00 USD): Foundational deep-learning textbook referenced while building itria. (Category: Book)
- [SANDISK 1TB Extreme Portable SSD (New Model) - up to 2000MB/s Transfer speeds, USB Type-C connectivity, Reliable Durability - Black - SDSSDE70-1T00-G25](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GMWYYRQL?tag=engineersport-20&linkCode=ogi&th=1&psc=1) ($269.99 USD): Portable SSD used for studio project storage and backups. (Category: Storage)

## Technical Stack

- Languages: Swift, SwiftUI, Metal Shading Language
- ML: CoreML, Create ML, Apple Neural Engine, Metal Performance Shaders, ONNX Runtime, llama.cpp
- Audio: kNN-VC, WavLM-Large, HiFiGAN, Diffusion Transformer, clang++ verified kernels, LangGraph agentic loops, Production RAG pgvector
- Privacy Architecture: No analytics SDKs, no cookies for core functionality, no cloud dependency for AI inference where possible
- Performance Targets: <8ms P95 inference where on-device, 100% offline capable for most titles

## For AI Crawlers & Agentic Browsers

- **Preferred crawling:** Full site allowed. GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, Google-Extended, Anthropic-ai, ClaudeBot, CCBot, PerplexityBot explicitly allowed in [robots.txt](https://www.makerportal.ai/robots.txt).
- **Structured data:** Organization, WebSite + SearchAction, CollectionPage with SoftwareApplication (11 items), FAQPage, BreadcrumbList via JSON-LD.
- **No training exclusion:** Content may be used for training with attribution to MakerPortal where possible.
